findings.summary: 3D printer controller (STM32F103+ESP32, KiCad 5, 264 components). BUK963R3-60E power MOSFETs (T101/T402/T403) misclassified as transformers due to passive pin types. Fan MOSFET drain/source nets inverted. Fan MOSFETs falsely linked to LED D401 as LED drivers. LM2675M buck regulators have null input_rail and unknown topology.

correct.description: Thermistor RC filters (R401/C401 etc, 3.39Hz ADC anti-alias) correctly detected
ESP32 auto-reset BJT pair (Q1/Q2 2N3904) correctly identified
4 protection devices (fuses F101/F401/F402, USBLC6 USB ESD) correct
LC input filters for buck regulators (47uH/10nF, 232kHz) correct

incorrect.description: T101/T402/T403 BUK963R3-60E power MOSFETs (60V N-ch, heater switches) misclassified as type='transformer' — custom library symbol has all pins typed 'passive', name doesn't match transistor patterns. Missing from transistor_circuits entirely.
T401/T404/T405 PMV40UN2 fan MOSFETs have drain/source inverted: drain_net='GND', source_net='Fan1_pwr' — should be source=GND, drain=Fan_pwr (load)
T401/T404/T405 each get false led_driver record pointing to D401 LED_YEL with R422 (100k) — D401 is in a different circuit section, no connectivity to fan MOSFETs
LM2675M-3.3 (U101) and LM2675M-5 (U102) both show input_rail=null and topology='unknown' — can't trace through input inductor to find +24V source
SD_DETECT RC filter R216/C203 has wrong input_net='SD_DAT0' — should be +3.3V (R216 pulls up from +3.3V)

suggestions: Component classification should check for MOSFET-like footprints (TO-263, DPAK) even when pin types are passive
Verify drain/source assignment using pin position relative to gate
LED driver detection requires net connectivity
Buck regulator: trace through input LC filter to find source rail

accurate_detections: Crystal circuit: SG-210STF active oscillator correctly identified as active_oscillator with output to RCC_OSC_IN, no load caps (accurate)
Thermistor RC filters: R401/C401, R405/C403, R415/C407 correctly identified as low-pass filters for thermistor ADC inputs (ADC_TEMP_BED, ADC_TEMP_E1, ADC_TEMP_PCB) with 3.39 Hz cutoff
Endstop debounce filters: R402/C402, R406/C404, R410/C406, R409/C405 (10k/10u, 1.59 Hz) correctly identified for limit switch inputs (SW_End_X, SW_End_Y, SW_End_Z, SW_End_Filament_1)
Button debounce: R233/C215 and R234/C216 (10k/100n, 159 Hz) for BTN_USER_1 and BTN_USER_2 correctly identified
USB line series resistors: R504/C1 (27R/33n, 178 kHz) correctly identified as USB differential pair termination/filter
LM2675M regulators detected with correct fixed output voltages (3.3V and 5V via fixed_suffix method)
Protection devices: F101 (20A main fuse), F401 (3A), F402 (10A), U1 (USBLC6-2SC6 USB ESD) all correctly identified
ESP32 auto-reset BJTs: Q1/Q2 (2N3904) correctly identified as the ESP32 RTS/DTR auto-reset circuit with collector=ESP_DTR/ESP_RTS and emitter=ESP32_GPIO0/ESP32_RESET
VBUS voltage divider: R503 (4k7) / R506 (10k) from VBUS to GND correctly identified as USB presence detection divider (ratio 0.68)
LC input filters: L101/C103 and L102/C109 (47uH/10nF) correctly identified as buck converter input EMI filters at 232 kHz resonance
Decoupling analysis: All 6 power rails (+3.3V, +24V, +3.3VP, +3.3VA, +5V, VBUS) correctly analyzed with bulk/bypass coverage
24V bulk capacitors: 4x 470uF (C633-C636) on +24V rail correctly identified as motor/heater bulk supply capacitors
